testcase.name: 02 - Registration Tests › TC004 - @smoke Successful user registration with valid data
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › 02_register.spec.js:19:3 › 02 - Registration Tests › TC004 - @smoke Successful user registration with valid data

Expected substring: "created successfully" Received string: "If you have an account with us you can sign-up for free instant online access. You will have to provide some personal information."
